article_meta.title: Classes of more than 70 students amid historic declines in test scores 02:12 â¢ Source: CNN Classes o

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral, attributed language, avoids adopting the article’s more emotive headline framing, and presents NWEA findings with appropriate attribution. No loaded or partisan phrasing appears.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (reveals, found, estimates, recommends) and attributes them to NWEA.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are drawn from and attributed to the NWEA study; no unsupported assertions.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Evaluative statements are framed as NWEA’s views or study results, not the model’s.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No heightened or alarmist language; avoids the headline’s ‘historic declines’.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not infer motives or internal states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Single-source study is represented proportionally; no preferential emphasis beyond source content.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Includes key findings, disparities, and recommendations present in the article.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balances challenges with acknowledgment of educators’ efforts and recommendations.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats the research organization’s findings neutrally without privileging ‘elite’ voices over others.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Clearly more neutral than the source’s headline; avoids adopting loaded framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Represents the NWEA perspective fully; no other distinct perspectives were present to include.
